one_line_thesis: Apple is the world's largest consumer technology platform by revenue and installed base, combining premium hardware with high-margin Services.

deep_dive.executive_summary:
Apple is the world's largest consumer technology platform by revenue and installed base, combining premium hardware with high-margin Services. FY2025 results show resilient cash generation: $6.58 of free cash flow per diluted share on $307 billion of consolidated net sales, with Services mix still climbing. The business is understandable as a pricing-power compounder, but the bear case is not tightly bounded at today's valuation multiple.

At about $326.59 per share, we expect the mechanical synthesis base return to be computed in Phase 3 (Lawrence owner-cash path pending refresh). Proof-fi...

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (High-return compounder). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.
pricing_analysis.strongest_counter_explanation: growth projected without its capital cost
pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AAPL, including core products and services owner cash, Services installed-base option, net financial claims, and regulatory/cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Core owner free cash flow is valued once; Services option, net financial claims, and regulatory reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for platform compounder.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Installed-base monetization through App Store, iCloud, and Apple Intelligence over 3 to 7 years.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 Services net sales $109.2B trajectory; Apple does not disclose standalone Apple Intelligence revenue.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Services scale uses existing platform; incremental R&D embedded in consolidated spend.

limitations: Services milestone value is judgment-based; deferred Services revenue partially embedded in consolidated free cash flow.
Regulatory and China reserve bands remain widest judgment components.

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF

FY2025 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: Component changes are classified from observable differences in quantity, comparable method, probability, timing, capital, evidence, and schedule scope.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Installed-base monetization through App Store, iCloud, and Apple Intelligence over 3 to 7 years.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from FY2025 Services net sales $109.2B trajectory; Apple does not disclose standalone Apple Intelligence revenue.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Services scale uses existing platform; incremental R&D embedded in consolidated spend.

Q2 FY2026 10-Q: six-month revenue $194.0B, net income $71.7B; cash $45.6B; shares ~14.67B
FY2025 10-K: revenue $307.0B, operating income $133.1B, OCF $111.5B, FCF ~$98.8B; Services $109.2B
FY2024 10-K baseline: revenue $294.9B; Services $96.2B as comparison year
WWDC 2024: Apple Intelligence platform announced; on-device and cloud AI integration across ecosystem
iPhone 15 launch with USB-C transition and continued Services bundling in hardware ASP
iPhone 14 and Emergency SOS via satellite expand hardware differentiation and Services attach
M1 chip launch begins Apple Silicon transition, improving margin and performance control
Apple announces Services, Apple TV+, Apple Arcade, and Apple Card pivot to recurring revenue
Company reaches $1 trillion market capitalization milestone on sustained buybacks and Services growth
AirPods launch expands wearables platform that later feeds Services and ecosystem lock-in
Apple Watch and Apple Pay extend hardware platform into payments and health Services
Original iPhone introduction redefines company from Mac maker to consumer platform

industry.structure: Global consumer electronics and platform software oligopoly: Apple, Samsung, and Chinese OEMs compete on hardware while Apple monetizes a captive installed base through Services, App Store, and payments.
industry.share_shift: Apple retains premium smartphone share in developed markets; Services mix rose to $109B in FY2025 while hardware refresh cycles lengthen.
industry.trend: On-device AI (Apple Intelligence), regulatory scrutiny on App Store fees, and China demand remain the dominant 2025–2026 swing factors.
